tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: By the time the rescue team arrived, the hikers _________ for almost forty-eight hours without food.
"Did you enjoy the exhibition?" -- "To be honest, it wasn't worth _________ all the way across town for."
The building, _________ was designed by a famous architect in the 1920s, is now a protected monument.
Seldom _________ such a moving performance in all my years of attending the theatre.
"Why didn't you call for help?" -- "I _________, but my phone had run out of battery."
The more carefully you plan the experiment, the _________ reliable your results will be.
